description: Implement all 6 P2DESIGN.md UI/UX tasks: (1) Headline/TL;DR on Results screen, (2) Tool-call trace visibility, (3) Artifacts tab default filters, (4) Collapse debate messages by default, (5) Cap Key Decisions/Risk Register to top 3-5, (6) Cleanup dead components and fix AgentDiagram icons.
steps: TASK 1 - ResultsDashboard headline: In src/components/workspace/ResultsDashboard.tsx, add a one-line recommendation headline at the very top of the results view (above the ConsensusMeter). Derive it from session.consensus data - show the top recommended decision with its confidence percentage. Example format: 'Recommendation: [title] - confidence X%'. If no recommendedDecisions exist, fall back to showing the overall confidence level.

TASK 2 - ToolCallTrace component: Create src/components/workspace/ToolCallTrace.tsx. This component renders a table showing agent name, files read, call count, and cap-hit status. Source the data from stage-progress events in the event stream - these events already carry { toolCallCount, capHit, filesRead } when groundedByRepo is true. Accept events as a prop (from DebateChat or the workspace). During proposal stage, show a 'live' version (e.g., 'Security agent is reading middleware.ts...'). After the round completes, show a static summary table. Integrate this into WorkspaceLayout - add it as a collapsible section within the Debate tab or as a sub-section visible during/after the proposal stage in DebateChat.tsx.

TASK 3 - Artifacts default filters: In src/components/workspace/WorkspaceLayout.tsx, change the initial value of artifactStatusFilter from 'all' to 'accepted'. Add a sort for artifacts by confidence (derived from status - accepted first, then by type priority). Add a clearly-labeled 'Show All' toggle button that resets both filters to 'all'. Keep the existing select dropdowns for fine-grained filtering.

TASK 4 - Collapse debate messages: In src/components/workspace/DebateMessage.tsx, render each agent turn collapsed by default - showing only agent name + one-line summary (parsed from content.summary). Click or keyboard (Enter/Space) expands the full structured content. Reuse the expand/collapse interaction pattern from ArtifactCard.tsx (useState boolean toggle). Add aria-expanded, role='button', tabIndex=0, focus-visible ring matching AgentArena.tsx conventions.

TASK 5 - Cap Key Decisions and Risk Register: In src/components/workspace/ResultsDashboard.tsx, show only the top 3-5 items in Key Decisions (sorted by confidence descending) and Risk Register (sorted by severity: high > medium > low). Add a 'Show all (N)' expander button below each section that reveals the full list. Use useState to track expanded state. Match the expand/collapse accessibility pattern.

TASK 6a - Delete dead components: Delete src/components/workspace/EngineeringOutcomesPanel.tsx, src/components/workspace/DecisionLog.tsx, and src/components/workspace/SharedWorkspace.tsx. These are confirmed unused - EngineeringOutcomesPanel imports DecisionLog but nothing imports EngineeringOutcomesPanel or SharedWorkspace. Verify with grep that no other file imports them.

TASK 6b - Fix AgentDiagram icons: In src/components/landing/AgentDiagram.tsx, replace the plain circle icon placeholders with real SVG icons. Use simple recognizable shapes: Architect (senior) = a building/layers icon, Guardian (security) = a shield icon, Optimizer (performance) = a lightning bolt icon, Advocate (product) = a heart/star icon. Use the existing agent color tokens. Keep the icons as inline SVG paths within the existing <g> elements.
acceptance_criteria: Results screen shows a one-line headline recommendation at the top before the consensus gauge
ToolCallTrace component exists and displays agent tool-call data from stage-progress events (not hardcoded)
Artifacts tab loads with 'accepted' status filter by default; a 'Show All' toggle resets to show everything
Debate messages render collapsed by default showing agent name + summary; clicking expands full detail
Debate message expand/collapse is keyboard-accessible (Enter/Space) with aria-expanded attribute
Key Decisions shows top 3-5 with 'Show all (N)' expander; Risk Register shows top 3-5 with expander
EngineeringOutcomesPanel.tsx, DecisionLog.tsx, SharedWorkspace.tsx are deleted and build still passes
AgentDiagram.tsx uses real SVG path icons instead of plain circles
npm run build passes with all changes
verification: npm run build exits with code 0
npm run lint exits with code 0
Confirm deleted files no longer exist: ls src/components/workspace/EngineeringOutcomesPanel.tsx src/components/workspace/DecisionLog.tsx src/components/workspace/SharedWorkspace.tsx should all fail
grep -r 'EngineeringOutcomesPanel\|DecisionLog\|SharedWorkspace' src/ should find no import statements
